lex.bot.message.CfnAbout: The object that provides message text and it's type.

lex.bot.message.CustomPayload.Description: A message in a custom format defined by the client application.

lex.bot.message.ImageResponseCard.Description: A message that defines a response card that the client application can show to the user.

lex.bot.message.PlainTextMessage.Description: A message in plain text format.

lex.bot.message.SSMLMessage.Description: A message in Speech Synthesis Markup Language (SSML) format.
